query:
ALTER TABLE projects 
ADD COLUMN modeladoApprovedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN modeladoApprovedBy VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN rendersApprovedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN rendersApprovedBy VARCHAR(255) NULL;
